books.title: AI Without the Hype
books.author: Sana Kapoor
books.description: A clear-eyed look at what machine learning can and cannot do, with examples drawn from real-world deployments.

books.title: Cells & Civilizations
books.author: Dr. Amara Okeke
books.description: How microscopic life shaped the rise and fall of empires. A sweeping look at biology's role in human history.

books.title: Code & Consequence
books.author: Priya Raman
books.description: A practical guide to writing software that lasts — covering architecture, ethics, and the quiet decisions that shape every system.

books.title: Letters from the Lighthouse
books.author: Eleanor Finch
books.description: A widow finds a bundle of unopened letters in her late husband's desk — and begins a correspondence that spans decades.

books.title: Oceans Beneath the Ice
books.author: Dr. Lila Thorne
books.description: Exploring the alien worlds of Europa and Enceladus, and what their hidden seas might tell us about life elsewhere.

books.title: Quantum Horizons
books.author: Dr. Eli Vance
books.description: An accessible journey into the strange world of quantum mechanics, exploring the theories reshaping our understanding of reality.

books.title: Stardust & Statistics
books.author: Prof. Henry Marlowe
books.description: The mathematics of the cosmos, from black holes to dark matter, written for the curious mind.

books.title: The Cartographer's Daughter
books.author: James Aldwick
books.description: Set in 19th-century Vienna, a young woman inherits her father's maps — and the dangerous secrets hidden in their margins.

books.title: The Glassmaker's Apprentice
books.author: Renato Bellini
books.description: On the island of Murano in 1487, a young apprentice discovers a recipe that could change the fate of nations.

books.title: The Pragmatic Architect
books.author: Tom Reinhardt
books.description: Lessons from twenty years of building large-scale systems, told through war stories and hard-won principles.

books.title: The Quiet Network
books.author: Daniel Cho
books.description: A novelist-turned-engineer's meditation on how the internet rewired human connection, for better and worse.

books.title: The Silent Echo
books.author: Marina Holloway
books.description: A haunting tale of a remote village where memories begin to disappear, and one girl must uncover the truth before her own past fades.
